subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the divine Lote-Tree, Jinab-i-Aqa Siyyid Hadi, thou hast arrived safely and securely and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره الرحمانیه جناب آقا سید هادی امنا و سالما واصل و در
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @call to action, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
